patient.query: Yeah, I guess I do feel pretty stuck. It's just... every time I think about looking for other jobs, I get overwhelmed. I keep thinking about how I don’t have any experience outside of what I’ve done before. And the idea of trying to learn something new or networking feels really daunting, like I’d just end up failing anyway. It’s hard to see a way out.

patient.query: Yeah, I suppose there have been moments when my boss appreciated my work, like when I helped out with that big project last year. It’s like I can see those little wins, but they feel overshadowed by what I think I should be achieving or what others are doing. I don’t know… it’s frustrating to feel like I’m never quite measuring up.
